rationale: The citing paper is an editorial/content-coding review of 401 JMR articles (2013–2019), while the cited paper is one specific 2019 empirical JMR article; this setup suggests a possible example/listing role rather than clear substantive dependence. However, the matched evidence only shows a DOI-level reference entry with no in-text context or quoted citation sentence, so we cannot safely confirm it is purely incidental. Given this sparse evidence, a definitive drop is not fully supported.
